subject: TSL Daily Digest — Mar 13, 2026
html:
TSL Internal

TSL Daily Digest

Friday, March 13, 2026  ·  For Sam & David

Key moves today

  • Full product co-work session with David — homepage redesign scoped to single-screen (sourcing left, pitch deck upload right, nothing below the fold). Clear decision to hide Analysis, Networks, and Community Events pages until there's critical mass.
  • Pitch deck upload workflow locked in: drag/drop → benchmarking → interested/not interested/diligence queue. "Diligence" triggers upsell (reference checks, two-pagers). Two-pager is the key differentiator over Vantager — combines deck data with community intelligence.
  • Fund evaluation framework built out — graduation rate (55-60%+), GP commit (>2%), fund size ÷ 10 ownership target, and valuation methodology (pro forma vs. last-round vs. preemptive markdown). Don at Sunshine Lake flagged as a strong Fund 1 to watch — meeting next week.
  • NY event set for Monday April 27. Goal: at least one paid customer ($10K) by May.

Priorities for Monday

  1. productPitch deck upload demo — deadline Mar 18, committed to Charlotte. DocSend extraction still the key blocker. This is the week.
  2. productHomepage redesign to single-screen — sourcing left, upload right. Scope is clear from today's session.
  3. gtm(David) Supabase access for Sam + connect with Marco (VC Lab) re: emerging manager pipeline.

Watch list

  • Charlotte onboarding + Burgiss data access — unconfirmed. Needs to happen before the Mar 18 demo.

Open tasks

  • [David] Inbound follow-ups from SF week — carrying forward
  • [David] Supabase access for Sam — from co-work, Mar 13
  • [David] Connect with Marco (VC Lab) re: fund pipeline — from co-work, Mar 13
  • [Sam] Pitch deck upload + DocSend extraction (deadline Mar 18)
  • [Sam] Homepage single-screen redesign — from co-work, Mar 13
  • [Sam] Master fund list from Shy's database (post-2017, under $150M)
  • [Sam] Charlotte platform login + Burgiss data access
  • [Sam] Introduce Charlotte to Ben & Will
  • [Sam] Email Cameron re: fund investment
  • [Both] NYC event April 27 — invites, format, goal: 1 paid customer by May

Source: Sam / David Co-Work (Mar 13), Sam / David Co-Work Continued (Mar 13)
